top3.sql:
SELECT forename || ' ' || surname AS full_name, url AS wiki_page_link, dob
FROM drivers
WHERE nationality = 'German' 
  AND dob BETWEEN '1971-01-01' AND '1985-12-31'
ORDER BY dob DESC;

SELECT forename || ' ' || surname AS full_name, url AS wiki_page_link, dob
FROM drivers
WHERE nationality = 'German' 
  AND dob BETWEEN '1971-01-01' AND '1985-12-31'
ORDER BY dob DESC;

SELECT forename || ' ' || surname AS full_name, url AS wiki_page_link, dob  
FROM drivers  
WHERE nationality = 'German'  
  AND strftime('%Y', dob) BETWEEN '1971' AND '1985'  
ORDER BY dob DESC;

SELECT forename || ' ' || surname AS full_name, url AS wiki_page_link, dob
FROM drivers
WHERE nationality = 'German' 
  AND dob BETWEEN '1971-01-01' AND '1985-12-31'
ORDER BY dob DESC;

SELECT forename || ' ' || surname AS full_name, url AS wiki_page_link, dob  
FROM drivers  
WHERE nationality = 'German'  
  AND strftime('%Y', dob) BETWEEN '1971' AND '1985'  
ORDER BY dob DESC;

SELECT forename || ' ' || surname AS full_name, url AS wiki_page_link, dob  
FROM drivers  
WHERE nationality = 'German'  
  AND dob >= '1971-01-01'  
  AND dob <= '1985-12-31'  
ORDER BY dob DESC;

final.sql:
SELECT forename || ' ' || surname AS full_name, url AS wiki_page_link, dob
FROM drivers
WHERE nationality = 'German' 
  AND dob BETWEEN '1971-01-01' AND '1985-12-31'
ORDER BY dob DESC;
